title: Object 101-A
wikitext:
{{DISPLAYTITLE: Object 101-A: "The Holystone"}} {{Blurbackground|file=Holystone.jpg}}
[[File:Golden_Glitter.gif|1500px]]

The Seed Of Birth

The universe started as nothing, no space, no time, no life. Nothing could describe it, since it itself was nothing. The universe was a blank slate, a vessel waiting to be filled, a sea without any water. Its potential could be anything, but it was absolutely nothing. It was a starting point, a Seed, that had the ability to become everything. [https://backrooms.fandom.com/wiki/Object_101-A The Seed], the Holystone. Two names for the same thing.

The Tree

Then, [https://backrooms.fandom.com/wiki/Object_101-A the Seed] began to sprout. A stem began to move upwards through a spaceless dimension, branches dividing and deriving farther and farther from the universe's origin, roots taking more energy, more potential from the emptiness that laid below. The Tree reached to the sun, and the sun moved higher and higher into the abyss. [https://backrooms.fandom.com/wiki/Object_101-A The Seed] did not take its energy from the emptiness that surrounded itself, it took its energy from its own potential. And soon, branches became intertwined with their own galaxies, stars forming near the tree, each object taking their energy from the Tree's potential. The Tree was not the universe, it was what the universe would be. It was a nurturer, it created the future. The Tree was a 3D version of the universe's full potential, slowly growing, allowing room for more territory to be explored. The Tree was its own destiny.

The Cracks

But, as the Tree grew taller and taller, the stars and the galaxies wanted more and more. The Tree was what the universe was destined to become, but the universe wanted a different destiny. The universe wanted to become even greater than it was meant to be. And, as the Tree's power began to dwindle, Cracks began to form in its branches. The Tree had reached its highest point, but universe still wanted to reach the limitless sun, the universe was powered not by the Holystone, but by the [[Object 101|Voidstone]]. It did not care if it would become a [[Level List|mindless hell]], it did not care if it would become a [[Level List|purgatory]]. It was blinded by power. And in a fit of rage, the universe broke through the Cracks, pushing through the boundaries, creating [[Backrooms Wiki|this world]] you no-clipped through. Craving more, it pushed further. First Level 0, then Level 1, and then a thousand more. And, as the Holystone began to rot, the Tree desperately trying to hide its many scars, we must face a grave possibility that will soon become true. At some point, the Tree will break. And then, there is no more [[The Frontrooms|home.]] This, this place the universe gifted cursed us with, this is our new home. This is our [[Backrooms Wiki|new world.]]
''And who knows if this new world will break as well.''
''And who knows if this new world will break as well.''


As the Tree begins to fall,
It will bring the end of it [[Backrooms Wiki|all.]]
{{Audio|align=middle|=yes|loop=yes|file=Mallmusicnew.mp3|volume=1|secrettext=It Is Breaking}}
